metadata.source: What's Cooking dataset (Kaggle) + ADEME CO2 data + Emblematic recipes

recipes.name: Spaghetti Carbonara
recipes.description: Classic Roman pasta with eggs, cheese and pancetta
steps: Cook spaghetti in salted boiling water until al dente.
Fry beef mince until crispy.
Whisk eggs with grated cheese and black pepper.
Combine hot pasta with egg mixture off heat, add crispy beef.
Serve immediately with extra cheese.

recipes.name: Margherita Pizza
recipes.description: Neapolitan pizza with tomatoes, mozzarella and basil
steps: Make pizza dough with flour, water, yeast and salt.
Spread crushed tomatoes seasoned with garlic and oil.
Add torn mozzarella pieces.
Bake at high heat until crust is golden.
Top with fresh basil leaves.

recipes.name: Coq au Vin
recipes.description: Chicken braised in red wine with mushrooms and onions
steps: Brown chicken pieces in butter.
Sauter vegetables until softened.
Add red wine and herbs, simmer until chicken is tender.
Reduce sauce and serve with crusty bread.

recipes.name: Ratatouille
recipes.description: Provencal vegetable stew with eggplant, zucchini and tomatoes
steps: Slice all vegetables thinly.
Layer vegetables in a baking dish.
Drizzle with olive oil and herbs.
Bake until tender and caramelized.

recipes.name: Beef Tacos
recipes.description: Seasoned ground beef in corn tortillas with toppings
steps: Brown beef with onions and spices.
Warm tortillas on a dry pan.
Assemble tacos with beef and toppings.
Serve with salsa and lime.

recipes.name: Guacamole
recipes.description: Avocado dip with lime, onions and cilantro
steps: Mash ripe avocados.
Mix with diced onions, tomatoes and cilantro.
Season with lime juice and salt.
Serve immediately with tortilla chips.

recipes.name: Pad Thai
recipes.description: Stir-fried rice noodles with shrimp, eggs and peanuts
steps: Soak rice noodles until soft.
Stir-fry shrimp and scrambled eggs.
Add noodles with tamarind and fish sauce.
Top with crushed peanuts and lime.

recipes.name: Green Curry
recipes.description: Creamy coconut curry with chicken and Thai basil
steps: Simmer coconut milk with curry paste.
Add sliced chicken and cook through.
Add vegetables and Thai basil.
Serve over jasmine rice.

recipes.name: Chicken Tikka Masala
recipes.description: Grilled chicken in creamy tomato curry sauce
steps: Marinate chicken in yogurt and spices.
Grill or bake chicken until charred.
Simmer tomatoes with spices and cream.
Add chicken to sauce and serve with rice.

recipes.name: Vegetable Biryani
recipes.description: Fragrant layered rice dish with spiced vegetables
steps: Parboil rice with whole spices.
Layer spiced vegetables and rice.
Steam covered until rice is fluffy.
Garnish with fried onions and mint.

recipes.name: Lamb Rogan Josh
recipes.description: Aromatic Kashmiri lamb curry with rich spices
steps: Brown lamb pieces in oil.
Sauté onions and garlic until golden.
Add yogurt and spices, simmer until tender.
Serve with basmati rice.

recipes.name: Kung Pao Chicken
recipes.description: Spicy stir-fry with peanuts and dried chilies
steps: Dice chicken and marinate briefly.
Stir-fry chicken until golden.
Add vegetables and sauce.
Top with roasted peanuts.

recipes.name: Fried Rice
recipes.description: Wok-fried rice with eggs and vegetables
steps: Use cold day-old rice for best texture.
Scramble eggs and set aside.
Stir-fry vegetables then add rice.
Season with soy sauce and sesame oil.

recipes.name: Tonkotsu Ramen
recipes.description: Rich pork bone broth with noodles and chashu
steps: Simmer pork bones for rich broth.
Prepare chashu pork belly.
Cook ramen noodles al dente.
Assemble with soft-boiled egg and toppings.

recipes.name: Chicken Teriyaki
recipes.description: Grilled chicken glazed with sweet soy sauce
steps: Make teriyaki sauce with soy, sugar and ginger.
Grill or pan-fry chicken until golden.
Glaze with sauce until sticky.
Serve with steamed rice and broccoli.

recipes.name: Lamb Tagine
recipes.description: Slow-cooked lamb with apricots and warm spices
steps: Brown lamb pieces in tagine or Dutch oven.
Add spices, vegetables and dried fruits.
Slow cook until meat is tender.
Serve with couscous and preserved lemon.

recipes.name: Chicken Couscous
recipes.description: Steamed couscous with spiced chicken and vegetables
steps: Simmer chicken with spices and vegetables.
Steam couscous over the broth.
Serve couscous topped with chicken and veggies.
Drizzle with broth and harissa.

recipes.name: Paella
recipes.description: Saffron rice with seafood, chicken and chorizo
steps: Brown chicken and seafood in paella pan.
Add rice, saffron and stock.
Cook without stirring for crispy bottom.
Rest before serving with lemon wedges.

recipes.name: Moussaka
recipes.description: Layered eggplant casserole with meat and bechamel
steps: Slice and grill eggplant.
Cook spiced meat sauce.
Make bechamel with milk and cheese.
Layer and bake until golden.

recipes.name: Pho Bo
recipes.description: Beef noodle soup with aromatic broth and fresh herbs
steps: Char onion and ginger for broth.
Simmer beef bones with star anise and cinnamon.
Cook rice noodles separately.
Serve with rare beef slices and fresh herbs.

recipes.name: Feijoada
recipes.description: Black bean stew with pork and beef
steps: Soak black beans overnight.
Simmer beans with smoked meats.
Fry onions and garlic, add to stew.
Serve with rice, collard greens and orange.

recipes.name: Fish and Chips
recipes.description: Battered fried fish with thick-cut fries
steps: Cut potatoes into thick chips and fry twice.
Make beer batter with flour and eggs.
Coat fish and fry until golden.
Serve with mushy peas and tartar sauce.

recipes.name: Fried Chicken
recipes.description: Crispy seasoned fried chicken
steps: Marinate chicken in seasoned buttermilk.
Dredge in spiced flour mixture.
Fry until golden and cooked through.
Rest before serving.

recipes.name: Chicken Adobo
recipes.description: Chicken braised in vinegar, soy sauce and garlic
steps: Marinate chicken in soy sauce and vinegar.
Brown chicken pieces.
Simmer with garlic and bay leaves.
Reduce sauce and serve with rice.

recipes.name: Jerk Chicken
recipes.description: Spicy grilled chicken with Jamaican jerk seasoning
steps: Make jerk marinade with scotch bonnet, allspice.
Marinate chicken overnight.
Grill over charcoal until charred.
Serve with rice and peas.

recipes.name: Caprese with Lemon Peel
steps: Finely chop the garlic cloves.
In the same pan, saute the chopped aromatics until fragrant and soft (about 3-4 minutes).
Add the lemon peel and cook for 5-7 minutes.
Season with garlic cloves and parsley. Adjust salt and pepper to taste.
Serve warm and enjoy!

Serve warm and enjoy!
